Package com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components

Class ScheduledRetirementContributionCreate

java.lang.Object
com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components.ScheduledRetirementContributionCreate
public class ScheduledRetirementContributionCreate extends Object
ScheduledRetirementContributionCreate - The retirement contribution details for a scheduled deposit

  • Constructor Details

    • ScheduledRetirementContributionCreate

      public ScheduledRetirementContributionCreate(Optional<Integer> taxYear, Optional<? extends TemporalTaxYear> temporalTaxYear, ScheduledRetirementContributionCreateType type)

    • ScheduledRetirementContributionCreate

      public ScheduledRetirementContributionCreate(ScheduledRetirementContributionCreateType type)

  • Method Details

    • taxYear

      public Optional<Integer> taxYear()
      An explicit tax year value. The current year is always valid; and the prior year is valid only before the tax deadline. Must be in "YYYY" format.

    • temporalTaxYear

      public Optional<TemporalTaxYear> temporalTaxYear()
      A temporal tax year value. This will always evaluate to a year based on the date the transfer was initiated.

    • type

      public ScheduledRetirementContributionCreateType type()
      The type of retirement contribution.

    • builder

      public static final ScheduledRetirementContributionCreate.Builder builder()

    • withTaxYear

      public ScheduledRetirementContributionCreate withTaxYear(int taxYear)
      An explicit tax year value. The current year is always valid; and the prior year is valid only before the tax deadline. Must be in "YYYY" format.

    • withTaxYear

      public ScheduledRetirementContributionCreate withTaxYear(Optional<Integer> taxYear)
      An explicit tax year value. The current year is always valid; and the prior year is valid only before the tax deadline. Must be in "YYYY" format.

    • withTemporalTaxYear

      public ScheduledRetirementContributionCreate withTemporalTaxYear(TemporalTaxYear temporalTaxYear)
      A temporal tax year value. This will always evaluate to a year based on the date the transfer was initiated.

    • withTemporalTaxYear

      public ScheduledRetirementContributionCreate withTemporalTaxYear(Optional<? extends TemporalTaxYear> temporalTaxYear)
      A temporal tax year value. This will always evaluate to a year based on the date the transfer was initiated.

      The type of retirement contribution.
